# DevPlaybook
> Free developer tools and programming resources at devplaybook.cc

DevPlaybook is a collection of 134+ free, browser-based developer tools. No signup required. All tools run client-side with no data sent to servers.

## About
- Website: https://devplaybook.cc
- Purpose: Provide free, instant-access developer utilities
- Audience: Software developers, DevOps engineers, web designers, students
- Languages: English
- Pricing: Free (with optional Pro tier for advanced features)

## Tool Categories

### AI-Powered Tools
- [AI Code Review](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/ai-code-review): Automated code review with AI suggestions
- [AI Commit Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/ai-commit-generator): Generate conventional commit messages
- [AI Doc Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/ai-doc-generator): Auto-generate code documentation
- [AI Error Explainer](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/ai-error-explainer): Explain error messages in plain language
- [AI Regex Explainer](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/ai-regex-explainer): Explain regex patterns in plain language
- [AI SQL Builder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/ai-sql-builder): Natural language to SQL queries
- [AI Test Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/ai-test-generator): Generate unit tests from code
- [AI Token Calculator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/ai-token-calculator): Count tokens for LLM API calls
- [Prompt Template Builder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/prompt-template-builder): Build reusable prompt templates

### API & HTTP Tools
- [API Request Builder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/api-request-builder): Build and test API requests
- [API Tester](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/api-tester): Test REST API endpoints
- [API Response Formatter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/api-response-formatter): Format API responses
- [API Response Mock](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/api-response-mock): Generate mock API responses
- [API Rate Limit Calculator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/api-rate-limit-calculator): Calculate API rate limits
- [CORS Tester](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/cors-tester): Test CORS headers and policies
- [cURL Builder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/curl-builder): Generate cURL commands visually
- [HTTP Status Codes](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/http-status-codes): Reference for all HTTP status codes
- [HTTP Headers Inspector](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/http-headers-inspector): Inspect HTTP headers
- [HTTP Security Headers](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/http-security-headers): Check security headers
- [HTTP Snippet Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/http-snippet-generator): Generate HTTP code snippets
- [WebSocket Tester](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/websocket-tester): Test WebSocket connections

### JSON Tools
- [JSON Formatter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/json-formatter): Format and validate JSON
- [JSON Diff Viewer](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/json-diff-viewer): Compare two JSON documents
- [JSON to CSV](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/json-to-csv): Convert JSON to CSV format
- [JSON to TypeScript](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/json-to-typescript): Generate TypeScript interfaces from JSON
- [JSON to YAML](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/json-to-yaml): Convert JSON to YAML
- [JSON Schema Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/json-schema-generator): Generate JSON Schema from data

### Encoding & Conversion
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/base64-encoder): Encode and decode Base64
- [URL Encoder/Decoder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/url-encoder): Encode and decode URLs
- [HTML Entity Encoder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/html-entity-encoder): Encode/decode HTML entities
- [Image to Base64](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/image-to-base64): Convert images to Base64 strings
- [CSV to JSON](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/csv-to-json): Convert CSV to JSON format
- [HTML to Markdown](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/html-to-markdown): Convert HTML to Markdown
- [Text to Binary](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/text-to-binary): Convert text to binary
- [Number Base Converter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/number-base-converter): Convert between number bases
- [Unicode Lookup](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/unicode-lookup): Search Unicode characters

### CSS & Design Tools
- [CSS Grid Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/css-grid-generator): Visual CSS Grid layout builder
- [CSS Flexbox](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/css-flexbox): Flexbox layout playground
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/css-gradient-generator): Create CSS gradients
- [CSS Animation Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/css-animation-generator): Build CSS animations
- [Box Shadow Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/box-shadow-generator): Design CSS box shadows
- [Border Radius Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/border-radius-generator): Design border radius
- [CSS Clip Path Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/css-clip-path-generator): Create CSS clip paths
- [Color Picker](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/color-picker): Pick and convert colors
- [Color Palette Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/color-palette-generator): Generate color palettes
- [Color Contrast Checker](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/color-contrast-checker): Check WCAG contrast ratios
- [Color Converter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/color-converter): Convert between color formats
- [Aspect Ratio Calculator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/aspect-ratio): Calculate aspect ratios

### Code Formatting & Validation
- [SQL Formatter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/sql-formatter): Format SQL queries
- [CSS Formatter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/css-formatter): Format CSS code
- [CSS Minifier](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/css-minifier): Minify CSS files
- [HTML Formatter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/html-formatter): Format HTML code
- [JS Formatter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/js-formatter): Format JavaScript code
- [XML Formatter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/xml-formatter): Format XML documents
- [YAML Validator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/yaml-validator): Validate YAML syntax
- [TOML Validator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/toml-validator): Validate TOML syntax
- [Markdown Preview](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/markdown-preview): Live Markdown preview

### Git & DevOps
- [Git Command Builder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/git-command-builder): Build git commands visually
- [Git Cheatsheet](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/git-cheatsheet-interactive): Interactive git reference
- [Git Commit Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/git-commit-generator): Generate commit messages
- [GitHub Actions Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/github-actions-generator): Build CI/CD workflows
- [Gitignore Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/gitignore-generator): Generate .gitignore files
- [Docker Compose Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/docker-compose-generator): Build docker-compose.yml
- [Nginx Config Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/nginx-config-generator): Generate Nginx configs

### Regex
- [Regex Tester](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/regex-tester): Test regular expressions
- [Regex Playground](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/regex-playground): Advanced regex testing

### Security & Crypto
- [Password Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/password-generator): Generate secure passwords
- [Password Strength Checker](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/password-strength-checker): Check password strength
- [Hash Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/hash-generator): Generate MD5/SHA hashes
- [JWT Decoder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode and inspect JWT tokens
- [JWT Builder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/jwt-builder): Build JWT tokens
- [RSA Key Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/rsa-key-generator): Generate RSA key pairs
- [UUID Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/uuid-generator): Generate UUIDs

### Network & DNS
- [DNS Lookup](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/dns-lookup): Query DNS records
- [IP Geolocation](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/ip-geolocation): Look up IP location
- [Subnet Calculator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/subnet-calculator): Calculate subnet ranges

### Text & String Tools
- [Word Counter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/lorem-ipsum): Generate placeholder text
- [String Case Converter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/string-case-converter): Convert string cases
- [Slug Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/slug-generator): Generate URL-safe slugs
- [Line Sorter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/line-sorter): Sort lines of text
- [Diff Checker](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/diff-checker-v2): Compare text differences

### Utilities
- [Cron Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/cron-generator): Build cron expressions
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/unix-timestamp): Convert Unix timestamps
- [Timezone Converter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/timezone-converter): Convert between timezones
- [Pomodoro Timer](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/pomodoro-timer): Productivity timer
- [QR Code Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/qr-code-generator): Generate QR codes
- [Chmod Calculator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/chmod-calculator): Calculate Unix permissions
- [SemVer Checker](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/semver-checker): Validate semantic versions
- [Meta Tag Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/meta-tag-generator): Generate HTML meta tags
- [SVG Editor](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/svg-editor): Edit SVG files
- [SVG Optimizer](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/svg-optimizer): Optimize SVG file size
- [NPM Package Size Checker](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/npm-package-size-checker): Check npm package sizes
- [Env Parser](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/env-parser): Parse .env files
- [Markdown Table Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/markdown-table-generator): Build Markdown tables
- [README Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/readme-generator): Generate README files
- [Number Formatter](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/number-formatter): Format numbers

### Career Tools
- [Developer Resume Builder](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/developer-resume-builder): Build developer resumes
- [Resume Analyzer](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/resume-analyzer): Analyze resume quality
- [Resume Bullet Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/resume-bullet-generator): Generate resume bullets
- [Interview Question Generator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/interview-question-generator): Practice interview questions
- [Tech Salary Calculator](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/tech-salary-calculator): Compare tech salaries
- [GitHub Stats Card](https://devplaybook.cc/tools/github-stats-card): Generate GitHub stats cards

- URL: https://devplaybook.cc/blog
- Topics: Developer productivity, tool tutorials, web development best practices
